news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: 据DeFiLlama数据，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋DEX交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana ecosystem's total value locked rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, per DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, with improved smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain capabilities.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Foundation Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会研究小组发布草案，计划采用ZK-Rollup Layer2扩容，以降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling to reduce transaction fees for micro-payments.
